cart.title: ʻŌkeke
cart.howToPay: Pehea ʻoe e makemake ai e uku?
cart.allUpToDate: Ua hana ʻia nā mea a pau!
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: ʻAʻohe bila uku ʻole i loaʻa.
cart.addBillingAddress: E hoʻohui i ka helu wahi bila
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: E hoʻohui i ka helu wahi bila e hoʻomau i kāu kūʻai.
cart.selectPayPalType: E koho i ke ʻano uku PayPal
cart.addCardPrompt: E hoʻohui i kāti keleona, e kaomi i ka pihi Hoʻohui kāti hou.
cart.autoChargeCc: E uku ʻautonoma i ka kāti keleona
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: E uku no ka hoʻāla lawelawe. I ka loaʻa ʻana o ka uku, e hoʻāla ʻia kāu lawelawe koke.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Ma hope o ka uku ʻana, e wehe i kahi tikeke kākoʻo me ka ID o ka hana, ka lā, a me ka nui i ukuʻia. E hāʻawi mākou i ka uku ma ka lima.

creditCard.deleteConfirm: Ua maopopo iā ʻoe e wehe i kāu kāleka hōʻaiʻē {card}?
creditCard.name: Inoa
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Pono ka hōʻoia ma mua o ka hoʻohana ʻana i kāu kāti keleona. E uku ʻo InterServer i kāu kāti keleona me ʻelua nui ma lalo o $1.00 kēlā me kēia.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: E hōʻike ʻia kēia mau uku ma kāu bila ma loko o nā minuke ʻelua, maʻamau ma lalo o nā hana e kali ana. Inā ʻaʻole ʻoe e ʻike i kēia mau uku, e hoʻoiho i kāu mea hoʻopuka kāti.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: ʻO kēia mau uku ʻae no ka hōʻoia wale nō a e hoʻopau ʻia i loko o 3-5 lā, e pili ana i kāu panakō.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ke ʻae nei au i ʻelua uku manawa pōkole, kēlā me kēia ma lalo o $1.00.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: E komo i ka panakō pūnaewele o kāu kāti keleona a i ʻole e kelepona i kāu panakō e hōʻoia i ʻelua nui i ukuʻia. E hōʻike pinepine ʻia lākou ma lalo o Nā uku e kali ana. E nalowale kēia mau uku ʻae ma kahi o 3-5 lā.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: E hoʻokomo i ʻelua nui i ukuʻia i kāu kāti keleona. Pono nā waiwai ma USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: E ʻike ʻia ka mea he ʻokoʻa paha nā uku ma kāu bila kāti keleona mai ka mea e pono ai ma ka ʻaoʻao hōʻoia hope. Inā ʻaʻole hōʻike kāu bila i nā nui hana kumu i ka waiwai kālā pono, e pono ʻoe e kelepona i kāu hui kāti keleona.
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Ua hōʻoia ʻia kēia kāti a ua hiki ke hoʻohana i ko mākou ʻōnaehana.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: E hōʻoia mua i ka kāti keleona
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: E kaomi ma ʻaneʻi e hiki ai ke hoʻohana i kēia kāti keleona.
creditCard.removeCreditCard: E wehe i kēia kāti keleona

paymentSuccess.title: Ua Pomaika ʻi ka Uku
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Mahalo no kāu uku. Ua pau kou hoʻolilo ʻana me ka pomaika ʻi.

prepays.title: Kālā Uku Mamua
prepays.showingPage: Ke hōʻike nei i ʻaoʻao {page} o {totalPages} a me {records} moʻolelo o {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Hoʻohana ʻautonoma ma nā bila hou
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Makemake ʻoe e holoi i kāu prepay #{id} a me kona moʻolelo pili?

pay.title: Uku bila
pay.creatingPaymentRequest: Ke hana nei i noi uku...
pay.returnedFromPayment: Ua hoʻi mai mai ka uku.

paymentTypes.title: Nā ʻano uku
paymentTypes.ccNote: Pono e hōʻoia ʻia nā kāti keleona āpau ma mua o ka hoʻohana ʻana. E hōʻoia iā lākou ma ka kaomi ʻana i ka pihi "Hōʻoia".
paymentTypes.selectPreferredMethod: E koho i ka ala uku makemake ʻia
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Makemake ʻoe e holoi i kāu bila {id}?
